subagent_rows.reason: The latest frontier improvement should be tested for chronology robustness before further promotion or freeze.
The current primary is strong enough that the highest-value next step is to rule out window-specific luck.
Attribution can wait; what matters now is whether the new primary survives harder robustness checks.

interpretation: V1.27X freezes the unanimous post-promotion direction after the new primary reference was upgraded.
Commercial aerospace should now move to stronger walk-forward and robustness audits rather than more local tuning.
